form.formComment: Brings the right form to the table. Won by 3.5 m (Fr2) at this track (1:53.80) beating Hesaa Lister in 3yo+ 0LTW o eligible 3yo+ NR47 on March 31 at $3.20 at the bell was leading 4.1. Two runs back 10th (Fr4) over 2240m after showing early speed at Melton, at the bell was leading 1.3m 2WNC well beaten by Theroux (2:45.60) in MAIDEN on December 31 at $6.50. Sure to be further improved and should pay to follow.
